name: Pick-me-up (Tiramisu)
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces Mascapone or cottage cheese, if stuck
1 1/2 cups Strong coffee sweetened with 1/2 cup white sugar
40 Sponge finger cookies (about 3 inch by 1 inch each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs and set aside two whites in another bowl.
2. Combine the yolks, Marsala, and confectioner's sugar in a bowl.
3. Bring a pan of water to just below boiling, then turn down to simmer. Beat the yolk mixture over the water until it begins to swell and thicken (use a double-broiler or saucepan if available). Set aside.
4. Whisk the remaining whites into stiff peaks and fold them into the yolk mixture. Set aside.
5. Process or blend the cheese, then fold it into the egg/cheese mixture. Adjust sweetness as needed.
6. Dip each cookie in the coffee, allowing it to soak well. Arrange a layer of cookies on your dish.
7. Spread a thin coating of the egg/cheese mixture over the cookies. Repeat until all layers are used.
8. Run a knife around the edge of the build to smooth down the sides. Grate the chocolate and sprinkle over the top.
9. Chill until completely cold, then set aside.
